new.name: CVE-2023-43364-Searchor-RCE-Exploit
new.description: POC exploit via unsafe `eval()` usage in Searchor (< 2.4.2)

new.name: CVE-2026-52943
new.description: This is a Linux Kernel Local Privilege Escalation PoC code for CVE-2026-52943 a use-after-free in skbuff.c, my first 0day found by me in linux kernel

new.name: cve-2024-31317
new.description: Detailed discussion of Zygote vulnerability CVE-2024-31317

new.name: CVE-2026-44789-n8n-PrototypePollution-RCE
new.description: CVE-2026-44789 — n8n <1.123.43 HTTP Request pagination prototype pollution to RCE (NODE_OPTIONS runner-spawn gadget). Lab + automated PoC, verified e2e.

new.name: CVE-2026-56121-Feast-Unauth-RCE
new.description: CVE-2026-56121 — Feast <0.63.0 unauthenticated RCE via gRPC registry dill.loads of OnDemandFeatureView UDF (pre-auth). Lab + PoC, verified e2e.

new.name: CVE-2026-27626-PoC
new.description: OliveTin is a self-hosted web UI for exposing predefined shell commands to end users. This repository contains a proof-of-concept demonstrating two independent OS command injection vectors in OliveTin's Shell mode execution path, both of which bypass the application's intended shell-argument safety checks.

new.name: CVE-2025-69212-Authenticated-RCE-PoC
new.description: Automated PoC for CVE-2025-69212 - OpenSTAManager <=2.9.8 authenticated RCE

new.name: CVE-2026-46331
new.description: Chequeo y Fix de la vulnerabilidad "pedit COW"

new.name: CVE-2025-45422---Bbox
new.description: CVE-2025-45422: Proximus b-box UPnP Persistence & Access Control Bypass

new.name: CVE-2026-10580
new.description: PoC exploit for CVE-2026-10580 - Authentication Bypass in Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce <= 1.9.4 leading to Admin Account Takeover

new.name: dirtyclone-exploit
new.description: CVE-2026-46331 — Linux Kernel Local Privilege Escalation TC pedit + IPsec TEE Page Cache Corruption · Affected kernels: ≤ 6.12.9

new.name: pagecache-lpe-containment-kit
new.description: Educational, defensive kit for two Linux page-cache-corruption LPEs (DirtyClone CVE-2026-43503, pedit COW CVE-2026-46331): hardening, detection, verification, seccomp + validation harness. Detection and prevention only — no exploit code. TLP:CLEAR.

new.name: cve-2026-46817_PoC
new.description: Proof of Concept for Oracle CVE-2026-46817 - 30 June 2026

new.name: CVE-2026-31694-POC
new.description: Linux kernel FUSE readdir cache out-of-bounds write (CVE-2026-31694): a malicious FUSE server overflows a page-cache page by 24 bytes. PoC plus an unprivileged local-root exploit via /etc/passwd page-cache corruption. Run only inside a VM.

update.name: NimbusPWN-CVE-2022-29799-29800
update.description: Demonstrate local privilege escalation in networkd-dispatcher via CVE-2022-29799 and CVE-2022-29800 using this C proof of concept.
